历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7581 → 7820 → 5606 → 5404, showing a clear upward trend in recent years (decreasing ranking numbers). In 2024, there was a significant jump of about 2214 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, another increase of about 202 places compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5404. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia Physics Category was 33 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, with annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 48, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, and competitive pressure has not been alleviated by the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 59th, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating a mid-to-upper national comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms, reflecting moderate application interest. There is no history of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, highlighting strong strengths in economics, management, and humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, closely matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (e.g., Electronic Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information, Automation, Clinical Medicine). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Ningxia is approximately 44,550 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase from 44,491 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and its enrollment share in Ningxia is very small (in 2025, the university's total national enrollment was about 598, with 12 in Ningxia, accounting for about 2%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, more affected by the scale of local examinees than regional preferences. Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in Ningxia Physics Category examinees, and the neutral-to-stable university reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward from the baseline of 5404. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5374, with a range of 4874–5874.

For rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (close to 5000), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction (Law, Accounting, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics), with Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Automation as reach options. For rankings in the lower part of the range (close to 5800), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 as the main direction, with Tier 2 as safety. Tier 1 majors historically have admission rankings in the 1700–2800 range, requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the predicted range to have a chance.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, with comprehensive strength at the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; ranked 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a certain level of attention on short video platforms; no history of enrollment gaps; disciplines such as Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, etc., highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Accounting, International Economics and Trade, Business Administration, Cultural Industry Management, Marketing, Journalism, etc.).
